proposal_summary: Gauntlet recommends adding COMP to the reward contracts for Ethereum (28,000 COMP), Base (3,600 COMP), and Arbitrum (2,250 COMP).

disclosed_entities.name: COMP
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: adding COMP to the reward contracts

disclosed_entities.name: Ethereum reward contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: reward contracts of Base, Ethereum, and Arbitrum

disclosed_entities.name: Base reward contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: reward contracts of Base, Ethereum, and Arbitrum

disclosed_entities.name: Arbitrum reward contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: reward contracts of Base, Ethereum, and Arbitrum

claimed_actions.raw_action: Add 28,000 COMP to the Ethereum reward contract
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Tops up the Ethereum reward contract with 28,000 COMP

claimed_actions.raw_action: Add 3,600 COMP to the Base reward contract
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Tops up the Base reward contract with 3,600 COMP

claimed_actions.raw_action: Add 2,250 COMP to the Arbitrum reward contract
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Tops up the Arbitrum reward contract with 2,250 COMP

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal only requires topping up reward contracts with specified amounts of COMP.

limitations: No specific contract addresses are provided for the reward contracts or the COMP token.
The exact bridge or transfer methods (functions) to be used are not detailed in the text.
